details.test: Task 1: Submit speaking inquiry for in-person conference keynote with $10,000–$15,000 budget
Task 2: Add cheapest qualifying virtual team communication workshop to cart
Task 3: Shortlist longest leadership talk for engineering managers (50–200 audience)
Task 4: Subscribe to weekly newsletter with Leadership and Remote Work interests
Task 5: Highest-rated technology testimonial 500+ and related inquiry flow
Task 6: Save newest 2024 storytelling blog post to reading list
Task 7: Create and email 3-session virtual workshop series estimate for 40 people under $6,000
Task 8: Request first available Friday in September 2025 for virtual keynote
Task 9: Save and initiate download for free conference planning checklist resource
Saved Items overview: combined shortlist, reading list, and saved resources
